task_id.description: `null` means no ready task; the core exits 0 immediately.

items.description:
A knowledge-graph node reference (D1 §4). Not a filesystem path.

Format: `kg://<node-type>/<node-id>` where node-type is one of `context` / `aggregate` / `term` / `document` / `decision` and node-id is a kebab-case slug unique within its type. loop-audit verifies existence.

spec_refs.description: Frozen-requirement references as kg:// URIs; loop-audit verifies existence.
